scripts.test:runtime-contract: npm run build && node --test dist/orchestration/*.test.js dist/runtime/*.test.js dist/server/http-server.test.js
scripts.test:tools: npm run build && node --test dist/tools/*.test.js dist/runtime/service-container.test.js
scripts.validate:approval-runtime: npm run check && npm run test:approval-runtime
scripts.validate:agent-runtime: npm run check && npm run test:agent-runtime
scripts.validate:job-runner: npm run check && npm run test:job-runner
scripts.validate:observability: npm run check && npm run test:observability
scripts.validate:runtime: npm run check && npm run test:runtime-contract
scripts.validate:store: npm run check && npm run test:store-contract
scripts.validate:tools: npm run check && npm run test:tools
